title: Anonymize Known Names in Text
description: Replace any occurrence of names from a known list with '[NAME]' before sending text to a third-party model.
problem: Write anonymize(text, names) that replaces every whole-word occurrence of any name in `names` (case-insensitive) with '[NAME]'.
starter_code:
import re

def anonymize(text, names):
    # Replace whole-word matches of any name (case-insensitive) with [NAME]
    return text
hint: Build a regex pattern r'\b(' + '|'.join(re.escape(n) for n in names) + r')\b' with re.IGNORECASE, then re.sub with '[NAME]'.
